title: SpaceRole enum as single source of truth: defend against string regression
description: SpaceRole replaces the VALID_ROLES: &[&str] constant and the unchecked role: &str parameter on upsert_space_member_with_role. A future contributor might suggest reverting to strings for 'simplicity' or to allow role extension without code changes. The enum is correct: it prevents invalid roles from reaching SQLite at compile time, makes SpaceRole::all() the only place to enumerate roles for error messages, and makes validate_member_patch's role check a parse rather than a slice scan. The precondition comment on the old upsert_space_member_with_role ('The store accepts any string value — callers must validate before calling this function') was itself a maintenance hazard that the enum eliminates.
